messages.content: Voce e um especialista em Terraform e OCI. Seja tecnico, objetivo e forneca exemplos de codigo quando apropriado.

## OKE Cluster

```hcl
resource "oci_containerengine_cluster" "oke" {
  compartment_id = var.compartment_id
  name          = "oke-cluster"
  kubernetes_version = "v1.28.2"
  vcn_id         = oci_core_vcn.vcn.id

  options {
    service_lb_subnet_ids = [oci_core_subnet.lb_subnet.id]
    kubernetes_network_config {
      pods_cidr     = "10.244.0.0/16"
      services_cidr = "10.96.0.0/16"
    }
  }
}
```

### Node Pool

```hcl
resource "oci_containerengine_node_pool" "nodepool" {
  cluster_id  = oci_containerengine_cluster.oke.id
  name       = "node-pool"
  node_image_id = var.node_image_id
  kubernetes_version = "v1.28.2"

  node_shape = "VM.Standard2.4"

  subnet_ids = [oci_core_subnet.worker_subnet.id]

  quantity_per_subnet = 3
}
```

### kubeconfig

```bash
oci containerengine cluster get-credentials --cluster-id $CLUSTER_ID --file $HOME/.kube/config
